name: Cookie's Wings from Hell
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare chicken wings by cutting them into pieces as desired.
2. To reduce the heat level, add 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) of ground red pepper and 1 Tbsp of cayenne to the hot sauce mix. Adjust according to taste preference.
3. Heat the sauce mixture in a pan over medium heat for approximately 10 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
4. Dip the chicken wings into the heated hot sauce mixture, coating them thoroughly.
5. Store any remaining sauce in an airtight container and reheat as needed when dipping more wings.
Note: The original recipe mentions using "a gallon" of sauce, which is not specified in the provided instructions. Adjust the quantity based on your preference or serving size requirements.
